title: PvP Crosshair By Zent
description: A clean crosshair pack designed to sharpen your aim and improve PVP performance. Replaces the default crosshair with minimal, high-visibility designs that reduce distraction and help you lock onto targets.
body:
PvP Crosshair is a simple Minecraft mod by @Battlezent that adds a clean and fully customizable crosshair to help improve aim and visibility during PvP. It is lightweight, easy to use, and designed to fit naturally into gameplay without affecting performance or balance.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d62a22a70c56a37496521be50082dcd32db032.jpeg)
